sections.paragraph:
Original: עפר

Transliteration: ‛âphar

Phonetic: aw-far'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Piel) to dust, powder

Origin: a primitive root: meaning either to be gray or perhaps rather to pulverise; used only as denominative from H6083, to be dust

TWOT entry: 1664

Part(s) of speech: Verb
